title: croton paraensis
intro: Croton paraensis, also known as the "Para rubber plant," is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton paraensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
